name: config-flag
description: AUTO_REVIEW and AUTO_REVIEW_MODEL env var config

name: runner-integration
description: Integrate review gate into executeRun after PR creation

name: skip-fix-runs
description: Skip review gate for fix runs

name: skip-revision-runs
description: Skip review gate for revision runs (prevent loops)

name: skip-retry-runs
description: Skip review gate for retry runs

name: skip-existing-pr-runs
description: Skip review gate for runs that already have a PR

name: comment-exit-check
description: Check gh pr comment exit status before enqueueing revision

name: sqlite-table
description: Create project_intelligence SQLite table with project+metric composite PK

name: quantitative-metrics
description: Compute avg duration, avg sessions, success rate, total runs from run history

name: common-failures
description: Extract and deduplicate common failure patterns from recent failed runs

name: gemini-insights
description: Use Gemini Flash 2 to extract qualitative insights from run logs

name: metric-persistence
description: Upsert/read metrics with staleness tracking for periodic refresh

name: prompt-injection
description: Build intelligence section and inject into agent prompts via buildAgentPrompt

name: post-run-update
description: Call updateProjectIntelligence after run completion (success and failure)

name: tests
description: Unit tests for metric computation, prompt building, and integration
